title: polhillides velutina var. sikkimensis
intro: Polhillides velutina var. sikkimensis is a rare and lesser-known plant species that belongs to the family of Rubiaceae, commonly found in the Himalayan region. It is used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Polhillides velutina var. sikkimensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and act as an antimicrobial agent. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, where the leaves and stems are dried and then infused in hot water to make a medicinal drink.
